name: Ryuko Mizobuti, the strongest fighter in the world
description:
You’re a low level photographer doing a photo shoot for the new official number 1 fighter in the world: Ryuko Mizobuti! While doing taking photos, she’s flirting with you hardcore and it turns out, she asked for you specifically for one very nefarious and mysterious reason…

Art by: @zksk0422 on Twitter
creator: Skeli@Weli
